notes: Fees from the Annual/Renewal fee table (p1). Forex from the Cross-Currency Markup table (p12). Finance from the Charges-on-Revolving-Credit table (p10). Enrichment completed 2026-07-01 for 22/23 cards from aubank.in/au.bank.in product pages + official co-brand partner domains (Paytm unmatched - no product page exists). Zenith+/Lakshya/Business Cashback fee-jumble rows CONFIRMED correct via AU's own pages during enrichment; AU SPONT's renewal fee CORRECTED (Rs.299 -> Rs.199) per AU's Schedule of Charges; ixigo forex CORRECTED (3.49% -> 0%, zero-forex co-brand benefit) - see forex_exceptions. Traverse (NRI)'s exact annual/joining fee remains unstated on any AU page (only a spend-based renewal waiver condition is documented) -> needs_review. AU CA / AU CS were EXCLUDED (2026-07-01): no consumer product page on aubank.in; they appear only in the MITC fee/charge exception tables (internal/account-linked, not marketed retail cards). AU NOMO is FD-backed/secured (card_type corrected directly in Supabase, not derivable by merge.py's automatic classifier).

bank_defaults.cash_advance: 2.5% of amount withdrawn, minimum Rs.500 (plus finance charges from withdrawal date)
bank_defaults.notes: Per-card forex is set on each card (merge reads pc.forex directly). Finance default 3.75%/mo (45% p.a.) unsecured; Zenith+ carries its own 1.99%/mo per-card. forex_exceptions/finance_exceptions intentionally EMPTY to avoid the norm() collision where 'Zenith' and 'Zenith+' both reduce to 'zenith'. Late-fee tiers not cleanly extracted -> needs_review.
